overall.description: A third-person perspective follows a character through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, transitioning from an indoor luxury corridor with digital displays through a rainy elevated walkway and finally crossing a busy intersection with futuristic vehicles. The footage showcases high-fidelity game engine graphics with ray-traced reflections on wet surfaces and neon-lit architecture.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a luxurious indoor corridor with polished marble floors and a rocky water feature running along the right side. Massive digital displays cover the ceiling, showing vibrant abstract art, while glass walls line the left side of the walkway.

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes through large glass exit doors, transitioning from the indoor corridor to a covered outdoor walkway. The indoor water feature and digital ceiling disappear from view as massive concrete columns and the cityscape become visible ahead.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered elevated walkway lined with massive concrete pillars on the right and glass railings on the left. The wet concrete floor reflects the ambient lighting, and pedestrians with umbrellas are visible walking ahead toward the street crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway descending to street level in rain

descending ramp to street level while following pedestrians with umbrellas

sloped concrete ramp leading down to street level with yellow markings

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the covered walkway into the open rain, descending a ramp to street level. Neon signs illuminate the tall skyscrapers in the background, and the group being followed opens umbrellas as they enter the downpour, with rain particles visible in the air.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with futuristic vehicle traffic

futuristic black sedan drives past the crosswalk closely

tall pole with traffic signals and bright street lighting

segments.scene_description: The group crosses a wide wet intersection with prominent yellow and black striped crosswalk markings. Futuristic vehicles including a black sedan and a vintage-style car drive through the intersection. Large digital billboards cover the building facades, reflecting off the rain-soaked pavement under bright streetlights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sterile, high-end interior into the rain-soaked chaos of a neon-lit cyberpunk intersection. It begins in a luxurious indoor corridor characterized by polished marble floors, a rocky water feature, and vibrant abstract art displayed across the ceiling. As the camera passes through large glass exit doors, the indoor opulence gives way to a covered outdoor walkway where massive concrete columns frame a glimpse of the city ahead. The scene then shifts as the camera leaves the shelter of the walkway and descends a ramp into an open downpour, with rain particles filling the air and neon signs illuminating the surrounding skyscrapers. Finally, the movement leads the group across a wide, wet intersection marked by bold yellow and black stripes, where futuristic vehicles glide past buildings draped in massive digital billboards that reflect off the soaked pavement.
